name: Decision Path Reconstructable
description: Each consequential message should carry a DecisionPathID linking to a reconstructable decision graph.
rationale: Amber / flag: a DecisionPathID populated but not yet fully attributed is a soft condition — continue, but the decision graph must be reconstructable for audit.
source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
